All Star Shine Every Time

Spotless windows for homes & businesses across Central NJ. Free estimates, guaranteed satisfaction.

★ What We Do ★

Our Services

Window Cleaning

Interior and exterior window cleaning for homes and businesses across Central NJ. Streak-free results, every time. Free estimates guaranteed.

Get a Free Estimate →

Power Washing

Driveways, siding, decks, and fences blasted clean with professional-grade equipment.

Gutter Cleaning

We clear out debris and buildup so your gutters flow freely and protect your property.

Junk Removal

Fast, affordable junk removal for homes and businesses — we haul it, you forget it.

About All Star Window Cleaning

All Star Window Cleaning is a Central NJ-based cleaning company built on reliability, quality, and fair pricing. We handle window cleaning, power washing, gutter cleaning, junk removal, and more — serving both residential and commercial customers across Middlesex, Monmouth, and Somerset counties.

Every job is done right the first time. We offer free estimates, flexible scheduling, and a satisfaction guarantee on every service. The company is owner-operated by Dylan, who takes personal pride in every property we touch.

Get a Free Estimate
★★★★★
Rated 5 Stars on Google

The All Star Difference

  • 5-Star Rated on Google

    Our customers consistently rate us 5 stars. We take pride in every job and won't leave until you're satisfied.

  • Same-Day Service Available

    Need it done fast? We offer same-day and next-day appointments across Central NJ.

  • Satisfaction Guaranteed

    Not happy? We come back and make it right. Every time, no questions asked.

  • Streak-Free Results

    Professional-grade equipment and technique means crystal-clear, streak-free windows on every visit.

★ Where We Work ★

Serving Central NJ

Based in Sayreville, NJ — we travel to homes and businesses across Central & Shore NJ.

Areas We Cover

  • Sayreville
  • South Amboy
  • Perth Amboy
  • Old Bridge
  • Parlin
  • South River
  • Milltown
  • East Brunswick

Don't see your town? Contact us — we likely cover it.

Frequently Asked Questions

Yes! We clean windows for homeowners and businesses across Central NJ. Whether it's a single-family home or a multi-story commercial building, we've got you covered.
For most homes we recommend 2–4 times per year. Commercial properties with high foot traffic or storefront windows benefit from monthly or bi-monthly service.
We do our best to accommodate same-day requests. Call us and we'll let you know our earliest availability — fast turnaround is one of our specialties.
We're based in Sayreville, NJ and serve all of Central NJ including Middlesex, Monmouth, and Somerset counties.
Absolutely. If you're not satisfied with the results, let us know and we'll come back to make it right — no questions asked.
